mapper.select: select a.prodid, a.linecd, a.ordymd, a.lotno, a.proymd, a.progcd, p.prognm, a.itemcd, b.itemnm, a.prdqty, r.insp_req_dt, r.insp_req_no, r.insp_how, r.judg_cd from hpio220t_tbl a inner join hsba010t_tbl b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.itemcd = b.itemcd left outer join hpba100t_tbl p on a.cmpycd = p.cmpycd and a.progcd = p.progcd left outer join pd_insp_req r on a.cmpycd = r.cmpycd and a.prodid = r.prodid and r.insp_gb = #{insp_gb} where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.linecd = #{linecd} and a.proymd between #{proymd_fr} and #{proymd_to} and ( (#{insp_gb} = '200' and b.astkind = '210') or (#{insp_gb} = '300' and b.astkind = '200' and a.progcd = ( select top 1 progcd from hpba200t_tbl where cmpycd = a.cmpycd and linecd = a.linecd and itemcd = a.itemcd order by progord desc ) ) ) order by a.proymd desc, a.itemcd asc, a.prodid desc;
